billing.title: Billing Overview
billing.hint: Everything in the Billing section. The sidebar keeps the day-to-day shortlist; the rest lives here, one click away.

admin.title: Administration
admin.hint: Everything in the Admin section. The sidebar keeps the day-to-day shortlist; the rest lives here, one click away.

hubs.empty: No pages available for your role.

neverRun.headline: ⚠️ Quarterly DR Drill Has Never Been Run
neverRun.detail: No disaster-recovery drill has been recorded yet. Please follow the runbook in docs/dr-drill.md to validate your backup and restore procedure.

failed.headline: 🚨 Last DR Drill FAILED ({{date}})
failed.detail: The last automated drill detected one or more failures. Your backup may not be recoverable.

overdue.headline: ⚠️ DR Drill Overdue — Last Run {{days}} days ago ({{date}})
overdue.detail: The quarterly disaster-recovery drill has not been run in over 90 days. Please schedule a manual drill per docs/dr-drill.md to confirm recoverability.

drDrill.hint: Automated checks (backup + integrity queries) run every quarter. Phases 2–3 (destroy + restore) must be run manually on a test instance.

emailVerify.sentConfirm: Verification email sent — check your inbox.
emailVerify.rateLimited: Too many requests — please wait a minute and try again.
emailVerify.sendFailed: Couldn't send the verification email. Try again shortly.

portalDashboard.subtitle: Manage your invoices, payments, and support requests below.

clientList.title: Clients
clientList.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, phone or client ID…

contractList.title: Contracts
contractList.noRadius: No PPPoE/RADIUS account provisioned for this contract.
contractList.credentialsForbidden: You don't have permission to view PPPoE credentials (requires the devices.view permission).
contractList.passwordForbidden: Insufficient permission to view the password (requires radius.credentials.view).

editModal.escalationEnabledHint: When off, this contract never automatically creates a technician ticket, regardless of the fault detected.
editModal.escalateOnDisconnectHint: Only enable this for clients with a battery backup — otherwise normal power outages will trigger unnecessary technician tickets.
editModal.opticalMinDbmHint: Rare-case override for this client only — leave blank to use the standard threshold (-27 dBm).
editModal.wirelessSignalMinDbmHint: Rare-case override for this client only — leave blank to use the serving sector's default, or -75 dBm if the sector has none set.
editModal.wirelessLinkCapacityMinMbpsHint: Rare-case override for this client only — leave blank to use the serving sector's default. There is no organization-wide default, so the capacity check reports 'unknown' until a threshold is set here or on the sector.

quoteDetail.noItems: No line items yet. Add one below.
quoteDetail.convertGuard: Only accepted quotes can be converted to an invoice.

form.integerQuantityRequired: Quantity must be a whole number for inventory-linked products.

recordPayment.title: Record Payment
recordPayment.selectClientFirst: Select a client to load their open invoices.
recordPayment.invalidAmount: Please enter a valid amount greater than zero.
recordPayment.noOpenInvoices: No open invoices for this client. This payment will be recorded as unallocated credit.
recordPayment.excessCreditHint: The amount above the checked invoices' balance stays as client credit.
recordPayment.recordedAsCredit: Recorded as an unallocated credit on the client's account.
recordPayment.paymentAlreadyRecorded: The payment is already recorded — retrying only re-applies it to the selected invoices. Amount and details can no longer change.
recordPayment.loadInvoicesError: Could not load this client’s open invoices.

userList.title: Users

editUserModal.orgPrefillError: Couldn't load this user's current organization access. Retry before saving — saving now could remove access they still have.

userList.archiveSelfDisabledTitle: You cannot archive your own account

archiveModal.title: Archive user?
archiveModal.body: {{name}} will be archived and deactivated. You can restore this account later from the Archived tab.

archivedTab.restoredNotice: {{name}} was restored as inactive. Activate the account from the Users tab if needed.

userGroups.deleteConfirm: Delete this user group? It will be soft-deleted and removed from the list.

modal.systemNotice: System groups cannot be renamed or re-based — only the description can be changed here.

permissions.title: Permissions — {{name}}
permissions.readOnlyNotice: This group's permissions are not editable — its access comes from the legacy admin bypass, and this list is never consulted. Shown here read-only for reference only.

profecoComplaints.errorRequired: Consumer name and description are required.

general.redactPii: Redact PII before sending to provider

providers.empty: No providers configured. Add one to enable AI replies.

forbiddenTerms.description: Replies containing these terms will be rejected and not sent to clients.

confirm.deleteProvider: Delete this provider? This cannot be undone.
confirm.deletePhrase: Delete this phrase? This cannot be undone.

aiSuggestedReply.title: AI Suggested Reply
aiSuggestedReply.noReply: No AI draft for this ticket yet.

communicationCampaigns.title: 📣 Communication Campaigns
communicationCampaigns.description: Send bulk email, SMS, or WhatsApp messages to a filtered set of customers. Track delivery, opens, and bounces per campaign.

dispatch.title: Send Campaign
dispatch.confirm: Dispatch campaign "{{name}}" via {{channel}} to all matching clients?

delete.confirm: Delete campaign "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

messages.title: Campaign Messages
messages.empty: No messages yet. Dispatch the campaign to populate this list.

clientDnd.description: Configure per-channel opt-out preferences and quiet-hour windows for this customer. Opt-outs are enforced for marketing / bulk sends; critical transactional notices are not affected.

form.optOut: Opted out (do not send marketing messages)

clientDnd.note: Opt-outs suppress bulk / marketing sends only. Invoice, payment, and service suspension notices are always delivered regardless of DND settings.

plans.sessionTimeoutSecondsHint: Max session duration in seconds. Leave blank for no limit.
plans.idleTimeoutSecondsHint: Disconnect after this many seconds of inactivity. Leave blank for no limit.
plans.simultaneousUseHint: Maximum concurrent sessions per subscriber (RADIUS Simultaneous-Use).
plans.accessWindowsHint: When set, subscribers on this plan can only connect during the specified windows (Login-Time attribute).
plans.accessWindowDayMaskHint: Bitmask: bit0=Sun, bit1=Mon, …, bit6=Sat. 127 = all days.

invoiceSettings.title: Invoice Branding Settings
invoiceSettings.footerLegalPlaceholder: Enter legal disclaimer or company registration details…
invoiceSettings.paymentInstructionsPlaceholder: Enter bank transfer details, payment methods accepted, etc.

emailSettings.title: Outbound Email (SMTP) Settings
emailSettings.enabledHint: When off, this organization falls back to the global email relay.
emailSettings.notConfigured: Not configured — using the global email relay.

taxReports.title: Tax Report Export
taxReports.description: Export billing records for a date range as CSV or JSON for accounting and tax filing.
taxReports.noData: No records found for the selected period.

radius.vlanIdHint: IEEE 802.1Q VLAN (1–4094). Leave blank to skip VLAN assignment.
radius.innerVlanIdHint: QinQ inner tag (1–4094). Only set when double-tagging is required.
radius.simultaneousUseOverrideHint: Per-account session limit. Leave blank to inherit the plan default.
radius.routesHint: Each row generates one Framed-Route reply attribute during authentication.
radius.walledGardenEnabledHint: When enabled, unpaid subscribers placed in the walled garden receive a Mikrotik-Address-List CoA attribute.
radius.walledGardenRedirectUrlHint: Captive portal / payment page URL for NAS redirect rules.
radius.walledGardenAddressListNameHint: MikroTik address-list name sent via Mikrotik-Address-List attribute.
radius.walledGardenAllowedDestinationsHint: Newline-separated hosts/CIDRs that walled users can reach. Used for NAS ACL configuration reference.
radius.walledGardenSaveError: Failed to save walled garden settings.
radius.kickSessionsHint: Disconnects the oldest excess sessions for any subscriber over their simultaneous session limit.

pppoe_service_profiles.title: PPPoE Service Profiles
pppoe_service_profiles.name: Profile Name
pppoe_service_profiles.service_name_hint: PPPoE Access Concentrator service name. Must match the pppoe-service-name configured on the NAS. Leave blank to accept any.
pppoe_service_profiles.mtu_hint: Maximum Transmission Unit (bytes). PPPoE over Ethernet ceiling is 1492.
pppoe_service_profiles.auth_methods_hint: Comma-separated list of allowed authentication protocols (pap,chap,mschapv2). This is stored for NAS-side configuration reference; FreeRADIUS derives all three from Cleartext-Password.
pppoe_service_profiles.rate_limit_override_hint: Vendor rate-limit string (e.g. MikroTik: '10M/5M'). When set, replaces the plan speed attribute for subscribers using this profile. MikroTik-specific.
pppoe_service_profiles.address_list_hint: MikroTik firewall address-list name. Sent as Mikrotik-Address-List reply attribute.
pppoe_service_profiles.filter_id_hint: RFC 2865 Filter-Id attribute value for NAS firewall policy matching.
pppoe_service_profiles.ipv6cp_enabled_hint: Negotiate IPv6 Control Protocol during PPPoE session establishment.
pppoe_service_profiles.delegated_prefix_len_hint: DHCPv6-PD prefix length to delegate (e.g. 56, 60, 64). Requires IPv6CP enabled.
pppoe_service_profiles.nat64_enabled_hint: Apply NAT64 translation for IPv6-only subscribers accessing IPv4 resources.
pppoe_service_profiles.dns64_prefix_hint: DNS64 synthesis prefix (e.g. 64:ff9b::/96). Configured on the DNS64 resolver, not sent via RADIUS.

pppoe_diagnostics.title: PPPoE Diagnostics
pppoe_diagnostics.auth_failures_empty: No authentication failures found in the selected window.
pppoe_diagnostics.mtu_heuristic_note: Note: LCP failure advisories are heuristic. A profile with non-1492 MTU and LCP errors may be unrelated to MTU configuration.

advisory_types.lcp_failure_mtu_mismatch: LCP failures with non-1492 MTU profile

device_import.columns_hint: Required: name, ip_address | Optional: type, mac_address, snmp_community, snmp_version, snmp_port, site_id

utilization.title: PON Port Utilization
utilization.maintenanceNoteHint: Reason for locking port (e.g. fiber repair)

powerBudget.title: Optical Power Budget Calculator
powerBudget.description: Calculate the optical power budget for a PON link. Uses GPON Class B+ maximum path loss of 28 dB.

fiberPlantManagement.title: Fiber Plant Management
fiberPlantManagement.subtitle: Fiber route topology, ODF port management, OTDR test records, and SFP module inventory.

overview.hint: Select a tab to view device data.

clientAssign.saveFailed: Could not update the linked client.

rfThresholds.introExisting: Default diagnostic thresholds for clients served by this sector. A per-client override on the contract always wins over these values.
rfThresholds.introNew: This AP/PTP device has no sector configuration yet. Set a threshold below and Save to create one — the rest of the sector's RF settings can be filled in later from Wireless Management.
rfThresholds.signalMinDbmHint: Minimum healthy CPE signal for clients on this sector. Leave blank to use the org-wide default (-75 dBm).
rfThresholds.linkCapacityMinMbpsHint: Minimum acceptable negotiated RF link rate (TX/RX) for clients on this sector. Leave blank — there is no org-wide default, so the capacity check reports 'unknown' until a threshold is set here or on the client's contract.
rfThresholds.saveFailed: Could not save the sector's RF thresholds.

timeline.empty: No activity recorded for this site yet.

overview.hint: Select a tab to view NAS data.

tunnel.notProvisioned: WireGuard tunnel not yet provisioned for this NAS.
tunnel.serverDisabled: WireGuard server is not enabled on this host — snippets are available but the operator must apply them manually.

nasWireguard.title: WireGuard Tunnel
nasWireguard.intro: Scan this NAS for connected LAN subnets to route through the WireGuard tunnel, then confirm which to include.
nasWireguard.selectSubnets: Select the subnets to route through the tunnel:
nasWireguard.noSubnetsFound: No subnets were auto-discovered. You can add one manually below.
nasWireguard.manualInvalid: Enter a valid IPv4 CIDR, e.g. 10.0.0.0/24
nasWireguard.manualDuplicate: That subnet is already in the list.
nasWireguard.successApi: WireGuard configured on the router via API.
nasWireguard.successSnippet: Router API unreachable — paste the snippet below to finish setup.
nasWireguard.quickBootstrapHint: Fetch the one-time RouterOS paste config to bring this tunnel up. Use this first — before the tunnel is connected.

wgTunnels.fullTunnelLabel: Full tunnel (route all traffic through VPN)
wgTunnels.fullTunnelHint: When enabled, all device internet traffic is routed through FireISP. Disable for split-tunnel access to device LANs only.
wgTunnels.title: My VPN Tunnels
wgTunnels.subtitle: WireGuard access tunnels for your devices.
wgTunnels.empty: No tunnels yet. Add a device to get started.
wgTunnels.serverDisabled: VPN provisioning is not active on this server. Config files are issued but you must apply the peer manually.

modal.configHint: Save your configuration now — your private key will not be shown again.

qr.title: Scan to Configure
qr.hint: Scan with the WireGuard mobile app to import this device.

confirm.revokeBody: This will immediately disconnect and remove this device from the VPN. Are you sure?
This will immediately disconnect {{user}}'s device "{{name}}". Continue?
confirm.rotateBody: A new keypair will be generated. The user must re-download their configuration.

success.rotate: Keys rotated. User must re-download their config.

assignments.empty: No scopes assigned. Add NAS or site scopes below.
assignments.hint: Assign NAS devices or sites to grant this user's VPN tunnels access to those subnets.
assignments.adminNote: Admin users automatically reach all org subnets — no assignment needed.
assignments.successSave: Assignments updated. Live tunnels re-scoped immediately.

accessMode.label: Access Mode
accessMode.hint: How FireISP connects to this device: Direct = routable IP; Behind NAT = reachable only over its WireGuard tunnel.
accessMode.immutable: Access mode can't be changed after registration — delete and re-create to switch.

nasList.natedHint: FireISP will assign a WireGuard tunnel address as the device IP. After saving, open the WG tab, copy the bootstrap config, paste it into the router, then run Seed / Test.
